# hetzner-robot_storagebox_snapshot (Resource)

Creates a snapshot of a Storage Box.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a snapshot of a Storage Box.
resource "hetzner-robot_storagebox_snapshot" "nightly" {
  storagebox_id = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `storagebox_id` (Number) Storage Box ID

### Read-Only

- `automatic` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Snapshot name assigned by Hetzner
- `size` (Number)
- `timestamp` (String)
